requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility & Radio — Refrigerators and Connected Models (NBSM NS / NS-IEC CISPR 14 + NTA radio approval)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容与无线电——电冰箱及联网型号（NBSM NS / NS-IEC CISPR 14 + NTA无线电核准）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容與無線電——電冰箱及聯網型號（NBSM NS / NS-IEC CISPR 14 + NTA無線電核准）

summary.en: Nepal does not operate an EU-style standalone EMC Directive. Electromagnetic compatibility for household appliances is addressed, where applicable, through NBSM NS standards that adopt the IEC/CISPR family — for refrigerators and motor-operated household appliances the relevant basis is CISPR 14-1 (emission) and CISPR 14-2 (immunity), aligned with the IEC text adopted as NS. EMC requirements typically come into play as part of the NS conformity assessment for a regulated appliance rather than as a separate horizontal directive. Separately, any refrigerator that incorporates a radio module (Wi-Fi / Bluetooth smart connectivity) requires type approval from the Nepal Telecommunications Authority (NTA) before import and sale; the NTA governs radio-frequency equipment and spectrum. A plain (non-connected) refrigerator does not need NTA approval. Exporters should confirm with NBSM whether EMC test evidence is required for the model and, for any connected variant, complete NTA type approval through the importer. Status: INFORMATIONAL.
summary.zh: 尼泊尔不设欧盟式独立EMC指令。家用器具的电磁兼容（如适用）通过采纳IEC/CISPR系列的NBSM NS标准处理——对电冰箱及电动家用器具，适用基准为CISPR 14-1（发射）与CISPR 14-2（抗扰度），与采纳为NS的IEC文本对齐。EMC要求通常作为受管制器具NS合格评定的一部分出现，而非独立横向指令。另外，任何含无线电模块（Wi-Fi／蓝牙智能联网）的电冰箱在进口及销售前须取得尼泊尔电信管理局（NTA）的型号核准；NTA管辖射频设备与频谱。普通（非联网）电冰箱无须NTA核准。出口商应向NBSM确认该型号是否需要EMC检测证据，并就任何联网版本经进口商完成NTA型号核准。状态：信息性。
summary.zht: 尼泊爾不設歐盟式獨立EMC指令。家用器具的電磁相容（如適用）通過採納IEC/CISPR系列的NBSM NS標準處理——對電冰箱及電動家用器具，適用基準為CISPR 14-1（發射）與CISPR 14-2（抗擾度），與採納為NS的IEC文本對齊。EMC要求通常作為受管制器具NS合格評定的一部分出現，而非獨立橫向指令。另外，任何含無線電模組（Wi-Fi／藍牙智能聯網）的電冰箱在進口及銷售前須取得尼泊爾電信管理局（NTA）的型號核准；NTA管轄射頻設備與頻譜。普通（非聯網）電冰箱無須NTA核准。出口商應向NBSM確認該型號是否需要EMC檢測證據，並就任何聯網版本經進口商完成NTA型號核准。狀態：資訊性。

standards_or_laws: NBSM NS conformity — EMC handled within NS assessment where applicable (no standalone EMC directive)
NS / IEC-CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Emission requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus
NS / IEC-CISPR 14-2 — Immunity requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus
Nepal Telecommunications Authority (NTA) — type approval for radio-frequency equipment (required only for connected/smart refrigerator variants)

summary.en: In China, EMC for household appliances is mandatory and tested to GB 4343.1 (emission, equivalent to CISPR 14-1) and GB 4343.2 (immunity, equivalent to CISPR 14-2) within the CCC regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Connected appliances with radio modules require China's SRRC (State Radio Regulation Committee) / radio type approval and, for network-access equipment, MIIT-related approvals. Because both China's GB 4343.x and Nepal's NS-CISPR 14 basis trace to the same CISPR 14 text, the underlying EMC test methodology is closely aligned. However, Chinese CCC EMC test data and SRRC radio approval are domestic and are not automatically accepted by NBSM (EMC) or NTA (radio) — Nepal-side acceptance, NS conformity, and separate NTA type approval are determined locally.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用器具EMC为强制性，按GB 4343.1（发射，等同CISPR 14-1）与GB 4343.2（抗扰度，等同CISPR 14-2）在由SAMR/CNCA管理的CCC制度内检测。含无线电模块的联网器具须取得中国SRRC（国家无线电管理）/无线电型号核准，网络接入设备另需MIIT相关核准。由于中国GB 4343.x与尼泊尔NS-CISPR 14基准均溯源至同一CISPR 14文本，底层EMC检测方法高度对齐。但中国CCC EMC检测数据与SRRC无线电核准属国内性质，不被NBSM（EMC）或NTA（无线电）自动接受——尼泊尔侧的接受、NS合格评定及单独的NTA型号核准由当地决定。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用器具EMC為強制性，按GB 4343.1（發射，等同CISPR 14-1）與GB 4343.2（抗擾度，等同CISPR 14-2）在由SAMR/CNCA管理的CCC制度內檢測。含無線電模組的聯網器具須取得中國SRRC（國家無線電管理）/無線電型號核准，網絡接入設備另需MIIT相關核准。由於中國GB 4343.x與尼泊爾NS-CISPR 14基準均溯源至同一CISPR 14文本，底層EMC檢測方法高度對齊。但中國CCC EMC檢測數據與SRRC無線電核准屬國內性質，不被NBSM（EMC）或NTA（無線電）自動接受——尼泊爾側的接受、NS合格評定及單獨的NTA型號核准由當地決定。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1 — EMC emission for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus (equivalent to CISPR 14-1; mandatory under CCC)
GB 4343.2 — EMC immunity for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus (equivalent to CISPR 14-2)
SRRC radio type approval + MIIT network-access approval (for connected/radio variants)

gap.en: Two distinct items. (1) EMC: because both regimes descend from CISPR 14, the test content for a Chinese refrigerator largely matches what NS conformity would expect, but Chinese CCC EMC reports are not automatically recognised — IEC/CISPR-format reports are the most portable evidence for NBSM NS assessment, so exporters should ask NBSM/importer whether EMC evidence is required and in what form. (2) Radio: SRRC approval has no standing in Nepal; any smart/connected refrigerator must obtain NTA type approval before import, handled through the in-country importer. A non-connected refrigerator avoids the NTA step entirely. Plainly, Nepal has no EU-style standalone EMC Directive — EMC is folded into NS conformity rather than being a separate horizontal CE-style obligation. Verify current NBSM EMC requirements and NTA procedures locally.
gap.zh: 两个独立事项。（1）EMC：由于两套制度均源自CISPR 14，中国电冰箱的检测内容与NS合格评定预期大体一致，但中国CCC EMC报告不被自动认可——IEC/CISPR格式报告是供NBSM NS评定最具可移植性的证据，故出口商应向NBSM/进口商询问是否需要EMC证据及何种形式。（2）无线电：SRRC核准在尼泊尔无效；任何智能/联网电冰箱在进口前须取得NTA型号核准，由在地进口商办理。非联网电冰箱可完全免去NTA环节。明言之，尼泊尔不设欧盟式独立EMC指令——EMC并入NS合格评定，而非独立的CE式横向义务。请向当地核实现行NBSM EMC要求与NTA程序。
gap.zht: 兩個獨立事項。（1）EMC：由於兩套制度均源自CISPR 14，中國電冰箱的檢測內容與NS合格評定預期大體一致，但中國CCC EMC報告不被自動認可——IEC/CISPR格式報告是供NBSM NS評定最具可移植性的證據，故出口商應向NBSM/進口商詢問是否需要EMC證據及何種形式。（2）無線電：SRRC核准在尼泊爾無效；任何智能/聯網電冰箱在進口前須取得NTA型號核准，由在地進口商辦理。非聯網電冰箱可完全免去NTA環節。明言之，尼泊爾不設歐盟式獨立EMC指令——EMC併入NS合格評定，而非獨立的CE式橫向義務。請向當地核實現行NBSM EMC要求與NTA程序。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — EMC addressed within NBSM NS conformity where applicable (no standalone EMC directive); NTA radio type approval mandatory only for connected/smart refrigerator variants
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4343.1/4343.2 EMC under CCC for all units; SRRC/MIIT radio approval mandatory for connected variants

source.publisher: Nepal Telecommunications Authority (NTA) / Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology (NBSM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nepal has no EU-style standalone EMC Directive; EMC for refrigerators is handled within NBSM NS conformity using the CISPR 14 basis, which closely matches China's GB 4343.x. Chinese CCC EMC data is not automatically recognised — provide IEC/CISPR-format evidence if NBSM requires it. Only connected/smart refrigerators need NTA radio type approval, obtained through the Nepali importer; SRRC approval does not transfer. Confirm current NBSM EMC and NTA requirements with the importer and a qualified consultant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼泊尔不设欧盟式独立EMC指令；电冰箱EMC在NBSM NS合格评定内以CISPR 14为基准处理，与中国GB 4343.x高度一致。中国CCC EMC数据不被自动认可——若NBSM要求，请提供IEC/CISPR格式证据。仅联网/智能电冰箱需NTA无线电型号核准，经尼泊尔进口商取得；SRRC核准不可转移。请向进口商及合格顾问确认现行NBSM EMC与NTA要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尼泊爾不設歐盟式獨立EMC指令；電冰箱EMC在NBSM NS合格評定內以CISPR 14為基準處理，與中國GB 4343.x高度一致。中國CCC EMC數據不被自動認可——若NBSM要求，請提供IEC/CISPR格式證據。僅聯網/智能電冰箱需NTA無線電型號核准，經尼泊爾進口商取得；SRRC核准不可轉移。請向進口商及合格顧問確認現行NBSM EMC與NTA要求。
